eligible_applicant_type: Community Supported Agriculture (CSA) networks and associations
geographic_restrictions: Domestic entities located within the 50 U.S. states, the District of Columbia, American Samoa, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, or the U.S. Virgin Islands
project_area: Local and regional food business enterprises that process, distribute, aggregate, or store locally or regionally produced food products
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond eligibility criteria for domestic entities supporting local/regional food systems
eligibility_summary: Open to domestic entities (including agricultural businesses, nonprofits, local governments, tribal governments, etc.) supporting local/regional food systems. Requires 25% cost share. Four project types available: Planning ($25K–$100K), Implementation ($100K–$500K), Turnkey Marketing/Promotion ($50K–$100K), and Turnkey Recruitment/Training ($50K–$100K).
